name: Benebone Zaggler Chicken Flavor Chew Dog Toy
description: Help your canine companion satisfy his chewing cravings—and help keep him away from gnawing on your furniture—with Benebone’s Chicken Flavor Zaggler Chew Dog Toy. This chew toy zig zags when your pooch pushes it, which will help keep him amused and entertained all day long. It also features a raised design to help your pup easily grab the toy. This toy is made in the USA with a sturdy nylon material and is full of a drool-worthy flavor from real chicken!
